_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Stationeers
author: eggs@goover.dev
description: Stationeers dedicated server. Post-September-2025 terrain-update CLI (-file start). Supports all 6 playable maps plus tutorial scenarios. Set Beta Branch to 'preterrain' for legacy pre-update saves.
startup: export LD_LIBRARY_PATH="./steamcmd/linux64:./rocketstation_DedicatedServer_Data/Plugins/x86_64:./:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH}"; stty cols 80 rows 24; ./rocketstation_DedicatedServer.x86_64 SavePath "/home/container" -file start "${SAVE_NAME}" ${WORLD_ID} ${DIFFICULTY} ${START_CONDITION} ${START_LOCATION} -noclear -settings StartLocalHost true ServerVisible true GamePort ${SERVER_PORT} UpdatePort ${UPDATE_PORT} ServerName "${SERVER_NAME}" ServerPassword "${SERVER_PASSWD}" ServerMaxPlayers ${MAX_PLAYERS} ServerAuthSecret "${SERVER_AUTH_SECRET}" AutoSave ${AUTOSAVE} SaveInterval ${SAVE_INTERVAL} AutoPauseServer ${AUTO_PAUSE} UPNPEnabled ${UPNP} UseSteamP2P ${USE_STEAM_P2_P} LocalIpAddress 0.0.0.0 -logFile -

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# steamcmd Base Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
# Image to install with is 'ghcr.io/ptero-eggs/installers:debian'

##
#
# Variables
# STEAM_USER, STEAM_PASS, STEAM_AUTH - Steam user setup. If a user has 2fa enabled it will most likely fail due to timeout. Leave blank for anon install.
# WINDOWS_INSTALL - if it's a windows server you want to install set to 1
# SRCDS_APPID - steam app id found here - https://developer.valvesoftware.com/wiki/Dedicated_Servers_List
# SRCDS_BETAID - beta branch of a steam app. Leave blank to install normal branch
# SRCDS_BETAPASS - password for a beta branch should one be required during private or closed testing phases.. Leave blank for no password.
# INSTALL_FLAGS - Any additional SteamCMD  flags to pass during install.. Keep in mind that steamcmd auto update process in the docker image might overwrite or ignore these when it performs update on server boot.
# AUTO_UPDATE - Adding this variable to the egg allows disabling or enabling automated updates on boot. Boolean value. 0 to disable and 1 to enable.
#
 ##

# Install packages. Default packages below are not required if using our existing install image thus speeding up the install process.
#apt -y update
#apt -y --no-install-recommends install curl lib32gcc-s1 ca-certificates

## just in case someone removed the defaults.
if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
    echo -e "steam user is not set.\n"
    echo -e "Using anonymous user.\n"
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
else
    echo -e "user set to ${STEAM_USER}"
fi

## download and install steamcmd
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps # Fix steamcmd disk write error when this folder is missing
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

# SteamCMD fails otherwise for some reason, even running as root.
# This is changed at the end of the install process anyways.
chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## install game using steamcmd
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} $( [[ "${WINDOWS_INSTALL}" == "1" ]] && printf %s '+@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows' ) +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAID} ]] || printf %s "-beta ${SRCDS_BETAID}" ) $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAPASS} ]] || printf %s "-betapassword ${SRCDS_BETAPASS}" ) ${INSTALL_FLAGS} validate +quit ## other flags may be needed depending on install. looking at you cs 1.6

## set up 32 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so

## set up 64 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

## install end
echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: Display name shown in the server browser.

variables.name: Save Name
variables.description: Name of the world save folder. Auto-loaded on next boot if autosave is on.

variables.name: Map
variables.description: Maps: Moon (Lunar), Mars (Mars2), Europa (Europa3), MimasHerschel, Vulcan, Venus. Tutorials: Tutorial1, Tutorial2, Tutorial3, Airlock, FurnaceBasics, Manufacturing. For tutorials, leave Difficulty, Start Condition, and Start Location empty.

variables.name: Start Condition
variables.description: Default (DefaultStart), Default Community (DefaultStartCommunity), Brutal, Brutal Community (BrutalCommunity)

variables.name: Start Location
variables.description: Map-specific spawn ID. See https://stationeers-wiki.com/Dedicated_Server_Guide for valid IDs per map.

variables.name: Server Password
variables.description: Leave blank for a public server.

variables.name: Server Auth Secret
variables.description: Secret used by the server for authentication. Change from default before going public.

variables.name: Save Interval
variables.description: Time in seconds between each autosave. Should not be below 60.

variables.name: Auto Pause Server
variables.description: Pause the server when no players are connected.

variables.name: UPNP
variables.description: Enable UniversalPlugAndPlay (auto port forwarding; router must support).

variables.name: Use Steam P2P
variables.description: Whether the server should allow Steam P2P connections. Recommended to keep disabled.

variables.name: Update Port
variables.description: Steam query port. Game port is separate (SERVER_PORT allocation).

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Set to 1 to auto-update on boot, 0 to disable.

variables.name: Beta Branch
variables.description: SteamCMD beta branch (e.g., preterrain). Leave blank for the default branch.
